description: Legal record (#64) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 21v of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated 2 Iyyar [5324 CE] (1564 CE), a few days after the previous entry on the same page: 25 Nisan 5324 AM. Esther bt. Yosef al-Rūmī releases her husband from what he owes as alimony and the delayed dowry payment (meuḥar) from her ketubba. Furthermore, the couple agree to divorce later that day. Esther will take on the responsibilities of providing for their three children– Eliyya, Yosef, and Sulṭāna –and their marriages (זפאף). For further context on this divorce agreement, see the prior court record entry #63 involving the same couple. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בהספרייה הלאומית רוסיה.
